---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rdestia
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:emailkamu@gmail.com
---

Hi! I'm **Rani**, a Master's student in Economics at Universitas Gadjah Mada.

I write about economics, self-development, and reflections on ideas I find interesting. 
This site also serves as my academic portfolios including research, book reviews, 
and notes from my journey in applied econometrics.
